I will put my final answer inside \boxed{}.

The median factor is 1.898.

Converting 45.74:
45.74 * 1.898:
45.74 * 0.008 = 0.36592
45.74 * 0.090 = 4.11660
45.74 * 0.800 = 36.59200
45.74 * 1.000 = 45.74000
0.36592 + 4.11660 = 4.48252
4.48252 + 36.59200 = 41.07452
41.07452 + 45.74000 = 86.81452
= 86.814

I will now return the answer in \boxed{}
The answer in \boxed{–} is \boxed{86.814}
